g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the NASA Exoplanet Archive and MAST data sources')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the MAST archive for raw Kepler FITS files')
sendPrompt('What does the data ingestion module do in the Kepler pipeline?')
sendPrompt('What preprocessing steps are applied to Kepler light curves?')
sendPrompt('What does the Physics Lead review in the preprocessing step?')
sendPrompt('What features are engineered from the Kepler light curves?')
sendPrompt('What does the ML classification module do?')
sendPrompt('What outputs does the final results module produce?')
